---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BharatOne AI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## User Impact
Which Indian citizens would benefit? (farmers, students, seniors, etc.)

## Module
Which module does this relate to?
- [ ] Government Schemes
- [ ] Healthcare
- [ ] Legal
- [ ] Career
- [ ] Finance
- [ ] Documents
- [ ] Profile / Personalization
- [ ] AI Chat
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] New Module

## Additional Context
Mockups, screenshots, or reference links.
